title: Glazed Terracotta: Reloaded
description: Harmonized glazed terracotta colors that match their unglazed variants with refined pattern details.
body:
# Glazed Terracotta: Reloaded
*Recolors all glazed terracotta blocks to better match their unglazed counterparts, creating more harmonious and useable color combinations.*

## Features
  - Recolored all glazed terracotta textures for improved color consistency
  - Removed creeper face from cyan glazed terracotta design
  - Added creeper face to green glazed terracotta for thematic accuracy

## Installation
1. Download the resource pack
2. Place the .zip file directly in your resource packs folder
3. Activate in-game and enjoy!
